title: paronychia suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Paronychia suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa, also known as Spreading Bushy Spurred Portulaca, is a type of flowering plant in the Portulacaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paronychia suffruticosa subsp. suffruticosa include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its wound-healing and antimicrobial properties.
